Video.title: Container Homes: All Shapes and Sizes

Video.summary: Welcome aboard Offline, a vintage-inspired yacht packed with cutting-edge amenities.
Video.title: The Gambin's "Offline"

Video.summary: Captain Boomies joins the Paglias aboard their yacht Executive Decision for a deep-sea adventure.
Video.title: The Paglia's "Executive Decision"

Video.summary: Captain Boomies tours Wharf Rat, a Bahamian-blue beauty built for fun, travel, and serious sport.
Video.title: Captain Gill's "Wharf Rat"

Video.summary: In Knoxville, Tennessee, Captain Boomies joins the Arnold family for a very special maiden voyage.
Video.title: The Arnold's "A-Sea"

Video.summary: Jillian experiences a kaleidoscope of color exploring the Mosaic Tile House and the Rainbow House.
Video.title: Living in Art: Kaleidoscopic Homes

Video.summary: Nina heads to Nashville, Tennessee to turn a 37-acre farm into a family homestead.
Video.title: Creating a Family Homestead

Video.summary: Armed with fresh ideas, Charli and Kylie turn a forgotten attic into a welcoming flex room.
Video.title: Erin + Jesse: An Attic Transformed

Video.summary: Kylie and Charli bring smart solutions, bold materials, and thoughtful styling to a first home.
Video.title: Miya + Edgar: A Living Room Reimagined

Miya + Edgar: A Living Room Reimagined
Miya + Edgar: A Living Room Reimagined

Video.summary: Anne is an entrepreneur whose home office headquarters is having an identity crisis.
Video.title: Office

Video.summary: Jordan and Jeff crave an oasis that completely reimagines what a home gym can be.
Video.title: Home Gym Sanctuary

Video.summary: Nina gets back to the basics of gardening with tips and tricks anyone can adopt.
Video.title: A Bountiful Harvest

Video.summary: Nate and Emily have spent months remodeling, but the kitchen has been last on their list.
Video.title: Modern Mindful Kitchen

Video.summary: Designer Nikki Baize's home is a bold blend of Asian influences, Wabi-Sabi philosophy, and color.
Video.title: A Designer’s Zen in the Zone

Video.title: Moody & Masculine Mid-Century Style

Video.title: The Imagination Library's Magical Makeover

Video.title: A Tribute to The Brett Boyer Foundation

Video.summary: Hollie’s bland master bedroom lacks any sense of tranquility.
Video.title: Master Bedroom Retreat

Video.summary: Class is officially in session as Brad and Jennifer head to three different sites to meet their student flippers.
Video.title: Meet the Flippers

Video.summary: Before taking the class on a much-needed field trip, Brad and Jennifer drop in to check each flipper's progress.
Video.title: Demo and Drywall

Video.summary: Brad and Jennifer introduce the class to Ashley, a color specialist from Glidden.
Video.title: Doughnuts and Decisions

Video.summary: Brad and Jennifer stop by each site to see if the flippers have completed their last homework assignment.
Video.title: Who's Got the Grit?

Video.summary: Graduation looms near, and the flippers are hard at work putting the finishing touches on each home.
Video.title: Finishing Touches

Video.summary: The classmates unveil their spectacular finished homes in a final review with Brad and Jennifer.
Video.title: A "" Graduation
